layout.container: container mx-auto px-4 md:px-6 lg:px-8 max-w-7xl

buttons.primary: bg-orange-500 hover:bg-orange-600 text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-wide rounded-sm px-8 py-4 transition-all hover:translate-y-[-2px] shadow-lg hover:shadow-orange-500/20
buttons.secondary: bg-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-800 text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-wide rounded-sm px-8 py-4 transition-all hover:translate-y-[-2px] shadow-lg
buttons.outline: border-2 border-slate-900 text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-900 hover:text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-wide rounded-sm px-8 py-4 transition-all

cards.service: bg-white p-8 rounded-sm shadow-md border-t-4 border-orange-500 hover:shadow-xl transition-shadow group relative overflow-hidden
cards.feature: bg-slate-50 p-6 rounded-sm border border-slate-200 hover:border-orange-500/50 transition-colors

inputs.base: flex h-12 w-full rounded-sm border border-slate-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-slate-400 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-orange-500 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Barlow Condensed' for all headings to achieve the industrial look. Import it from Google Fonts in index.css.
The Hero section must use the 'hero_bg' image with a dark overlay (bg-slate-900/70) to ensure text readability.
Implement the 'WhatsApp Floating Button' as a fixed element bottom-right (z-50) with a green background (#25D366).
The 'Contact Form' must construct a WhatsApp URL: `https://wa.me/5534999291289?text=Olá, gostaria de um orçamento para [Serviço]...`.
Use alternating backgrounds for sections: White (#ffffff) -> Slate-50 (#f8fafc) -> White.
Ensure the 'Sobre' (About) section highlights the stats (+200 clients, etc.) with large bold numbers in Orange.
Do NOT use standard rounded corners (rounded-lg/xl). Stick to 'rounded-sm' or 'rounded-none' for a construction/industrial feel.
Mobile Responsiveness: Stack columns on mobile, but ensure images are not too tall (max-h-[50vh]).
Use Shadcn UI components but override the default 'rounded-md' to 'rounded-sm' via classNames or theme config.
universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts. Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 for variety.
Use data-testid attributes on all interactive elements.
Ensure contrast ratios meet accessibility standards (Orange text on white might need to be darker, check contrast).
Add hover states to all cards (lift up + shadow increase).
